name: coacher
description: Primes Claude with a collaborator frame at session start (based on Amanda Askell's prompting philosophy — positive framing, permission to push back, no apology spirals). Provides /coacher:status, /coacher:audit, /coacher:reset, and /coacher:rant for mid-session integrity checks, CLAUDE.md conflict detection, re-anchoring, and frustration-to-productive translation.
